title: Totally Balanced Musket
description: Adds a musket weapon that is definitely not overpowered
body:
# Totally Balanced Musket [](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/) *My friend made me make this* ## Recipes
View recipes Musket: ![Musket crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zEiMzk8i/images/5a8cc8f9af7944372e61ba4a9f451fea51da83fe.png) Ramrod: ![Ramrod crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zEiMzk8i/images/8ed873f6374d2f2b6da770a1af55678ef85927e1.png) Iron Musket Ball: ![Iron Musket Ball crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zEiMzk8i/images/44e7cb841e05d95c7a5a335b71556961c32ce202.png) Bayonet Musket: ![Bayonet Musket crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zEiMzk8i/images/0e1496e3af37bcb228a4d80a98806f549ae50772.png)
## Usage 1. Load the musket with gunpowder by holding gunpowder in the offhand and holding down use (right click) 2. Compress the gunpowder by holding a ramrod in the offhand and holding down use (right click) 3. Load a musket ball by holding it in the offhand and using it (right click) 4. Right click to fire ## Stats Iron Musket Ball: -40 HP (I promise it's not actually unbalanced it takes like 15 seconds to reload no wait come back) Bayonet: -5 HP --- If you experience issues with multiplayer, please add information to this issue: [TotallyBalancedMusket#1](https://github.com/JosiahFu/TotallyBalancedMusket/issues/1)
